name: Li-Ming
description: A high burst damage Mage who can reset her Abilities upon getting a takedown.
title: Rebellious Wizard
info: The derogatory moniker "wizard" is often given to mages with rebellious attitudes or an obsession with power. Li-Ming displays a little of both and she's hardly ashamed of it. After all, who are they to judge a wielder of limitless arcane magic?

LiMing.name: Magic Missiles
LiMing.description: Fire three missiles toward an area, each dealing 147 (+3.5% per level) damage to the first enemy hit. These missiles do 50% damage to Structures.

LiMing.name: Arcane Orb
LiMing.description: Fire an Orb that powers up as it travels, dealing 135 (+3% per level) damage to the first enemy hit. Damage is increased the further it travels, up to 270 (+3% per level) more damage.

LiMing.name: Disintegrate
LiMing.description: Channel a powerful beam, dealing 480 (+5% per level) damage over 2.6 seconds to enemies while they are in it. The direction of the beam changes with your mouse cursor position.

LiMing.name: Wave of Force
LiMing.description: Knock away all enemies from an area and deal 160 (+5% per level) damage.

LiMing.name: Critical Mass
LiMing.description: Getting a Takedown will refresh the cooldown on all of Li-Ming's Abilities.

1.name: Force Armor
1.description: When Magic Missiles damages an enemy Hero, gain 50 Spell Armor, reducing the damage taken by the next Ability by 50%. Gain 1 charge per cast and store up to 4 charges.  Passive: Li-Ming's Mana regeneration is increased by 100% while below 35% Mana.

1.name: Aether Walker
1.description: Teleport costs no Mana. If Li-Ming hasn't taken damage in the last 3 seconds, Teleport's cooldown is decreased by 2 seconds. Casting Teleport causes Li-Ming's next cast of Magic Missiles to deal 10% bonus damage.

1.name: Power Hungry
1.description: Regeneration Globes restore 100% more Mana and grant 10% Spell Power for 20 seconds.

4.name: Charged Blast
4.description: Basic Attacking a target recently hit by a Magic Missile does an extra 87 (+4% per level) damage.

4.name: Triumvirate
4.description: If Arcane Orb hits an enemy Hero after traveling at least 50% of its base range, the cooldown is reduced by 5 seconds and 40 Mana is refunded.

4.name: Dominance
4.description: Takedowns restore 30% of Li-Ming's missing Health.

7.name: Seeker
7.description: If three Magic Missiles hit the same target, the third one deals an additional 140 (+4% per level) damage.

7.name: Zei's Vengeance
7.description: Increase Arcane Orb's damage increase for distance traveled by 30%. Additionally, reduce its cooldown by 1 second.

7.name: Calamity
7.description: Teleport does 300 (+3% per level) damage to enemy Heroes near the destination.

10.name: Disintegrate
10.description: Channel a powerful beam, dealing 480 (+5% per level) damage over 2.6 seconds to enemies while they are in it. The direction of the beam changes with your mouse cursor position.

10.name: Wave of Force
10.description: Knock away all enemies from an area and deal 160 (+5% per level) damage.

13.name: Illusionist
13.description: If Li-Ming loses more than 20% of her Health at once, its cooldown is instantly refreshed.  This effect has a 4 second cooldown.  Passive: Increases Teleport range by 50%

13.name: Cannoneer
13.description: When Li-Ming uses an Ability, her next Basic Attack's damage is increased by 75% and deals Spell damage instead of Physical. Stacks up to 3 times.

13.name: Glass Cannon
13.description: Increase Li-Ming's Spell Power by 20%, but decrease her maximum Health by 15%.

16.name: Fireflies
16.description: Drastically increases Magic Missiles speed. Its cooldown is reduced by 1 second, and its Mana cost is reduced by 5.

16.name: Mirrorball
16.description: Magic Missiles fires an additional 2 missiles, but its Mana cost is increased by 5.

16.name: Arcane Orbit
16.description: Arcane Orb travels 25% farther, increasing its maximum distance damage bonus from 270 (+3% per level) to 371 (+3% per level).

16.name: Diamond Skin
16.description: Teleport grants a Shield equal to 25% of Li-Ming's maximum Health for 4 seconds.

20.name: Temporal Flux
20.description: Disintegrate gradually Slows enemies caught in its beam, to a maximum of 60%.

20.name: Repulsion
20.description: Increases Wave of Force knockback distance by 175% and increases its cast range by 95%.

20.name: Tal Rasha's Elements
20.description: Casting Abilities increases the damage of the next Ability by 5%, up to 20%. This bonus is reset when the same Ability is used within a chain.

20.name: Archon: Pure Power
20.description: Activate to enter Archon form, allowing Li-Ming to repeatedly use Disintegrate, but be unable to cast other Abilities.

tooltipMarkup.WizardAetherWalkerTalent: Teleport costs no Mana. If Li-Ming hasn't taken damage in the last <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, Teleport's cooldown is decreased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Casting Teleport causes Li-Ming's next cast of Magic Missiles to deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,WizardMagicMissilesDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[AetherWalker].Modifier"/>%</c> bonus damage.
tooltipMarkup.WizardArcaneOrb: Fire an Orb that powers up as it travels, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WizardArcaneOrbTooltipDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to the first enemy hit. Damage is increased the further it travels, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="16*Accumulator,WizardArcaneOrbAccumulator,MultiplierPerStep"/></c> more damage.
tooltipMarkup.WizardArcaneOrbArcaneOrbitTalent: Arcane Orb travels <c val="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> farther, increasing its maximum distance damage bonus from <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="16*Accumulator,WizardArcaneOrbAccumulator,MultiplierPerStep"/></c> to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(16+Talent,WizardArcaneOrbArcaneOrbit,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[4].Value)*Accumulator,WizardArcaneOrbAccumulator,MultiplierPerStep"/></c>.
tooltipMarkup.WizardArcaneOrbTriumvirateTalent: If Arcane Orb hits an enemy Hero after traveling at least <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of its base range, the cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,WizardArcaneOrbTriumvirateCooldownRefund,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"Player="0"/></c> seconds and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WizardArcaneOrbTriumvirateCreateManaHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Mana is refunded.
tooltipMarkup.WizardArcaneOrbZeisVengeanceTalent: Increase Arcane Orb's damage increase for distance traveled by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>. Additionally, reduce its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,WizardArcaneOrbZeisVengeance,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"Player="0"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.WizardArchonPurePowerHotbar: Activate to enter Archon form, allowing Li-Ming to repeatedly use Disintegrate, but be unable to cast other Abilities.
tooltipMarkup.WizardCannoneerTalent: When Li-Ming uses an Ability, her next Basic Attack's damage is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WizardCannoneerWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[Cannoneer1].Modifier*100"/>%</c> and deals Spell damage instead of Physical. Stacks up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WizardCannoneerTracker,MaxStackCount"/></c> times.
tooltipMarkup.WizardDisintegrate: Channel a powerful beam, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WizardDisintegrateDamage,Amount*(Behavior,WizardDisintegrateController,Duration/Behavior,WizardDisintegrateActive,Period)"/></c> damage over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WizardDisintegrateController,Duration+.0625" precision="1"/></c> seconds to enemies while they are in it. The direction of the beam changes with your mouse cursor position.
tooltipMarkup.WizardDisintegrateTemporalFluxTalent: Disintegrate gradually Slows enemies caught in its beam, to a maximum of <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WizardDisintegrateTemporalFluxSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*Behavior,WizardDisintegrateTemporalFluxSlow,MaxStackCount*100*(-1)" precision="2"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.WizardDominanceTalent: Takedowns restore <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,WizardDominanceMissingHealthAccumulator,Ratio"/>%</c> of Li-Ming's missing Health.
tooltipMarkup.WizardFireflies: Drastically increases Magic Missiles speed. Its cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, and its Mana cost is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,WizardFireflies,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[4].Value"/></c>.
tooltipMarkup.WizardForceArmorTalent: When Magic Missiles damages an enemy Hero, gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WizardForceArmorBlock,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/></c> Spell Armor, reducing the damage taken by the next Ability by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WizardForceArmorBlock,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/>%</c>. Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WizardForceArmorBlockRemoveBehavior,Count"/></c> charge per cast and store up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> charges.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Li-Ming's Mana regeneration is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WizardForceArmorManaRegen,Modification.VitalRegenMultiplier*100" precision="2"/>%</c> while below <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Validator,CasterEnergyLT35Percent,Value"/>%</c> Mana.
tooltipMarkup.WizardGlassCannonTalent: Increase Li-Ming's Spell Power by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WizardGlassCannon,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]*100"/>%</c>, but decrease her maximum Health by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WizardGlassCannon,Modification.VitalMaxFractionArray[Life]*100*(-1)"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.WizardMagicMissiles: Fire three missiles toward an area, each dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WizardMagicMissilesDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to the first enemy hit. These missiles do <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> damage to Structures.
tooltipMarkup.WizardMagicMissilesChargedBlastTalent: Basic Attacking a target recently hit by a Magic Missile does an extra <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WizardMagicMissilesChargedBlastDamage,Amount"/></c> damage.
tooltipMarkup.WizardMagicMissilesMirrorballTalent: Magic Missiles fires an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> missiles, but its Mana cost is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,WizardMagicMissilesMirrorball,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"/></c>.
tooltipMarkup.WizardMagicMissilesSeekerTalent: If three Magic Missiles hit the same target, the third one deals an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WizardMagicMissilesSeekerDamage,Amount"/></c> damage.
tooltipMarkup.WizardPowerHungryTalent: Regeneration Globes restore <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="((Talent,WizardPowerHungry,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value-1)*100)" precision="2" player="0"/>%</c> more Mana and grant <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WizardPowerHungryBuff,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]*(100)" precision="2"/>%</c> Spell Power for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WizardPowerHungryBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.WizardTalRashasElementsTalent: Casting Abilities increases the damage of the next Ability by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,WizardTalrashasElementsSourceMissileAccumulator,Scale*100"/>%</c>, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(100*Accumulator,WizardTalrashasElementsSourceMissileAccumulator,MaxAccumulation)"/>%</c>. This bonus is reset when the same Ability is used within a chain.
tooltipMarkup.WizardTeleportCalamityTalent: Teleport does <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WizardTeleportCalamityDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemy Heroes near the destination.
tooltipMarkup.WizardTeleportDiamondSkinTalent: Teleport grants a Shield equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WizardTeleportDiamondSkinBuff,DamageResponse.ModifyLimitVitalMaxFractionArray[Life]*100" precision="2"/>%</c> of Li-Ming's maximum Health for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WizardTeleportDiamondSkinBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.WizardTeleportIllusionistTalent: If Li-Ming loses more than <c val="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> of her Health at once, its cooldown is instantly refreshed. <n/><n/>This effect has a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WizardIllusionistCooldown,Duration"/></c> second cooldown.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increases Teleport range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,WizardTeleportIllusionist,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value/Abil,WizardTeleport,Range"player="0"precision="2"/>%</c>
tooltipMarkup.WizardTraitCriticalMass: Getting a Takedown will refresh the cooldown on all of Li-Ming's Abilities.
tooltipMarkup.WizardWaveOfForce: Knock away all enemies from an area and deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WizardWaveOfForceDamage,Amount"/></c> damage.
tooltipMarkup.WizardWaveOfForceRepulsionTalent: Increases Wave of Force knockback distance by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">175%</c> and increases its cast range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,WizardWaveOfForceRepulsion,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[3].Value/Abil,WizardWaveOfForce,Range"player="0"precision="0"/>%</c>.
